name: Lemon Herb Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Gently toss with a spoon until well blended just before using.
3. (For a more lemony flavor, add a little fresh lemon juice).
4. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry, dark place for up to 6 months.
5. This seasoning is good on fish, poultry, and salads.
